name: speakup-workspace
description: SpeakUp Anonymous Crime Reporting Platform Full-stack Workspace

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "yellow,cyan" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
